questionHtml: Some regions of DNA act as telomeres or produce tRNA. State one other function of DNA sequences that do not code for protein.
markschemeHtml:
a. regulate gene expression

b. act as promoter

c. role in chromosome pairing/crossing over/recombination

d. introns

OWTTE

[Max 1 Mark]

meta.title: Some regions of DNA act as telomeres or produce tRNA. State one other function of DNA sequences that do not code for protein.
